subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the Single, the All-Informed. Verily, We have manifested Our Self and have commanded all that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله الفرد الخبیر انا اظهرنا نفسنا و امرنا الکل بما
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly
